creator: kunishi@c.oka-pu.ac.jp
text:
----Next_Part(Fri_Oct_15_21:23:13_1999_809)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit

From: kunishi@c.oka-pu.ac.jp
Subject: ports/14349: Upgrade ports: textproc/xt to 19991008
Date: Fri, 15 Oct 1999 21:03:33 +0900

> >Number:         14349
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       Upgrade ports: textproc/xt to 19991008

Oops, I forgot Makefile diff in this send-pr... Sorry.

-- KUNISHIMA Takeo
----Next_Part(Fri_Oct_15_21:23:13_1999_809)--
Content-Type: Text/Plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="xt-Makefile.diff"

--- /usr/ports/textproc/xt/Makefile	Wed Sep  1 10:45:29 1999
+++ Makefile	Fri Oct 15 21:17:53 1999
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:	XT
-# Version required:	19990822
+# Version required:	19991008
 # Date created:		23 June 1999
 # Whom:			Jun Kuriyama <kuriyama@FreeBSD.org>
 #
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 #
 
 DISTNAME=	xt
-PKGNAME=	xt-19990822
+PKGNAME=	xt-19991008
 CATEGORIES=	textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.jclark.com/pub/xml/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.zip

----Next_Part(Fri_Oct_15_21:23:13_1999_809)----
